lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any damage or imperfections. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint still holds a strong shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and hood from normal road use. Inside, the upholstery is clean and well-preserved, with minimal wear on the bolsters. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has received regular servicing, ensuring it runs smoothly. It represents a solid choice for anyone looking for a dependable vehicle that has been cared for properly.

This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible signs of wear and tear on both the interior and exterior, including some scratches and minor dents. While the car is functional, some mechanical components may require maintenance or repair in the near future.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is recommended primarily for parts or as a major project for someone with mechanical expertise. It currently suffers from several significant mechanical failures, including a failing transmission and an engine that struggles to maintain idle. The exterior shows extensive rust on the wheel wells and door sills, and the clear coat is peeling in multiple areas. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears and a non-functional climate control system. It is being sold strictly as-is and will likely need to be towed from the lot.
Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in truly good condition and has been well cared for, offering a smooth, dependable driving experience you

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior preserved in pristine, untouched condition. Meticulously serviced and rigorously inspected, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Opportunities to acquire a vehicle of this caliber are exceedingly rare.

Hey there! You have got to see this beauty—it is in absolutely pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and honestly, it’s about as close to brand new as you can get. Not a single scratch or dent anywhere. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come check it out, you won't be disappointed!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. At its heart lies the S54 3.2L straight-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that has been professionally bulletproofed for total reliability. Power is managed via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains structurally flawless with proactive subframe reinforcement and a precision-tuned suspension featuring Bilstein dampers for neutralized body roll. Every mechanical component, from the high-pressure fuel rail to the bushings, is in showroom condition. This is a turn-key, investment-quality icon for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Original paint. No accidents. Smoke-free interior. Maintenance current.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine, collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish entirely free of chips, swirls, or blemishes, reflecting its life spent in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple and scent-free, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic component functions with factory-new precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history and a whisper-quiet engine that delivers smooth, effortless power. Meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its model year and is ready for the most discerning buyer.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. This investment-grade vehicle is prepared for immediate delivery to its next curator.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a showroom-quality aesthetic, remaining entirely free from discernible wear or cosmetic blemish. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a new assembly, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets the most exacting requirements. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've got to check out this absolute gem! It's in truly pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've pampered this car since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like a dream. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Come say hi and take it for a spin—you're going to love it!

This E46-generation icon features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to achieve exceptional volumetric efficiency. Meticulously maintained, this example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox paired with a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut with original suspension geometry, while the exterior displays flawless paint depth and factory-spec panel gaps. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive valve adjustment, ensuring the 8,000 RPM redline is explored with total confidence. A museum
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or interior wear. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

Presenting an absolute gem for the discerning collector: a showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, glass-like finish without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish. Every body panel aligns perfectly, and the original alloy wheels are pristine. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, free from any bolster wear or creasing, and it still retains that signature new-car aroma. All technological features, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assists, operate with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new, featuring a comprehensive service history and a whisper-quiet engine that delivers effortless power. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an uncompromising level of preservation that validates its status as a premier automotive asset. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, its mechanical integrity and aesthetic brilliance are beyond reproach. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark-standard automobile.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in superlative condition, characterized by flawless exterior paintwork and an interior that retains its original showroom integrity. Rigorously inspected and mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This absolute gem is in mint condition and has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage since day one. It's spotless inside and out, drives like a dream, and still has that fresh new-car smell! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and I’m so excited for it to find a new home where it’ll be just as loved. You really have to see this one in person to believe it!

This concours-level E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of BMW’s high-revving S54 engineering. Featuring a factory Getrag 6-speed manual and a reinforced rear subframe, the chassis offers exceptional torsional rigidity. The 3.2L inline-six delivers razor-sharp throttle response via individual throttle bodies, further optimized by a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and preventative rod bearing replacement. Finished in showroom-quality paint with a flawless interior, this specimen retains its factory-spec limited-slip differential and precise suspension geometry. A mechanically transparent, collector-grade example for the purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
2022 model. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Dealer maintained. Low mileage.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, meticulously preserved in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and treated with a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the original floor mats are spotless, and the interior still carries that factory-fresh scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the panoramic sunroof, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documenting every fluid flush and inspection performed ahead of schedule. The engine bay is immaculate, and the drive is incredibly tight, quiet, and responsive. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a truly flawless example that has been pampered with an obsessive attention to detail.

We are pleased to present this exemplary motorcar, maintained in superlative condition and reflective of the highest standards of automotive preservation. The exterior retains its original showroom luster, complemented by an interior that remains entirely pristine. Mechanically beyond reproach, this vehicle offers a refined driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such uncompromising caliber.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary vehicle in pristine, showroom-quality condition. This automobile has been meticulously maintained to an uncompromising standard, reflecting an aesthetic and mechanical integrity that is virtually indistinguishable from new. Every surface and component has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest criteria for discerning enthusiasts. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and provenance.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total gem. This car is in showroom-quality condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied it since day one, keeping it garage-tucked and professionally detailed so it stays looking pristine. It drives like an absolute dream and is just waiting for someone who will love it as much as I do. You won't find another one this clean, so come take a look and see for yourself!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing impeccable mechanical integrity and Concours-level preservation. At its heart lies the legendary S54B32 power plant, featuring factory-spec individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned VANOS system recently overhauled for optimal cam timing. This specimen features a reinforced rear subframe—a critical prophylactic measure—and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission delivering power through a variable M differential lock. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by a subtle Bilstein PSS10 coilover setup, maintaining factory roll centers while enhancing lateral grip. Every bushing has been refreshed with OEM+ polyurethane, and the braking system utilizes floating cross-drilled rotors for superior thermal dissipation. With zero fluid seepage and a pristine undercarriage, this M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available.

This is a true collector-grade vehicle that looks and feels as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior remains in pristine condition, featuring supple leather and that unmistakable factory-new aroma. Every button, switch, and feature operates flawlessly, and the mechanical performance is smooth and responsive. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and accompanied by a comprehensive service history, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. It is a turn-key masterpiece ready for its next discerning owner.

We are proud to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which represents the pinnacle of its class. Preserved in showroom condition, this specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting an uncompromising standard of prior ownership. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets the expectations of the most discerning buyer. This is an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and distinction.
